notes: Round 4 — spotlight fix: dialog steps (pin-add-image, pin-search-photo) now use separate tooltip steps with targetSelector on settings panel container (always-present) so tour completes; the overlay architecture prevents mid-step spotlight changes when targetSelector leaves DOM. pin-add-image covers open+stock-tab; pin-search-photo covers search+select+save. All clips re-rendered. 69.4s video.

steps.display_text: A Pin on Image slide lets participants tap anywhere on a custom image to mark their answer.
steps.tts_text: A Pin on Image slide lets participants tap anywhere on a custom image to mark their answer.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Pin on Image from the Unscored section of the slide type picker.
steps.tts_text: Select Pin on Image from the Unscored section of the slide type picker.

steps.display_text: Type your spatial question — tell participants exactly what to pin.
steps.tts_text: Type your spatial question — tell participants exactly what to pin.

steps.display_text: Open the image library and switch to Stock Photos.
steps.tts_text: Open the image library and switch to Stock Photos.

steps.display_text: Search 'world map', pick the one that fits your question, and save.
steps.tts_text: Open the image library, switch to Stock Photos, search 'world map' — then pick the one that fits your question and save.

steps.display_text: Click Preview to rehearse before going live.
steps.tts_text: Click Preview to rehearse before going live.

steps.display_text: The participant screen shows your image. Your audience taps it on their phone to drop a pin.
steps.tts_text: The participant screen shows your image. Your audience taps it on their phone to drop a pin.

steps.display_text: Pins appear live on the presenter screen as responses come in.
steps.tts_text: Pins appear live on the presenter screen as responses come in.

steps.display_text: That's all it takes. Hit Present when you're ready to go live.
steps.tts_text: That's all it takes. Hit Present when you're ready to go live.

mix_command: FFMPEG=./node_modules/ffmpeg-static/ffmpeg && $FFMPEG -y -i out/pin-on-image-r4-trimmed.webm -i out/s01.mp3 -i out/s02.mp3 -i out/s03.mp3 -i out/s04.mp3 -i out/s05a.mp3 -i out/s05b.mp3 -i out/s06.mp3 -i out/s07.mp3 -i out/s08.mp3 -i out/s09.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=5700|5700[a2];[3:a]adelay=8500|8500[a3];[4:a]adelay=13500|13500[a4];[5:a]adelay=19000|19000[a5];[6:a]adelay=28000|28000[a6];[7:a]adelay=44000|44000[a7];[8:a]adelay=49000|49000[a8];[9:a]adelay=58000|58000[a9];[10:a]adelay=64000|64000[a10];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7][a8][a9][a10]amix=inputs=10:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k out/pin-on-image-r4-narrated.webm
